title: Bolsius Smooth Pillar Candles - Set of 4 - Red - 60x40 mm - Decorative Candles - Long Burning Time - Unscented - with Natural Plant Wax - Without Palm Oil
features: The Bolsius smooth pillar candle in the colour Delicate Red is 6 cm tall, with a burn time of 7 hours. Crafted with passion for people and the planet, using natural vegan wax and palm oil free. The collection includes 4 elegant candles, which can be effortlessly combined with each other. Perfect for the Advent weeks.
As a timeless classic, Delicate Red is a proper deep red. Intense, seductive and sensual!

High-quality candles are notable for their long burning time and ability to retain their shape. Bolsius 'Essential' pillar candles have a smooth finish and do not smoke or drip. They are crafted from natural vegan wax from Europe and are palm oil free. The method used to braid the cotton wick creates a stable flame, so these candles burn without producing smoke or soot deposits.

Bolsius 'Essentials' candles in a smooth finish are essential in any interior. Various sizes and shades can be combined to suit your personal preference. Elegant and subtle! Crafted with passion for people and the planet, using natural vegan wax made from olive oil, sunflower oil or rapeseed oil, and palm oil free. Every season, we introduce new trend colours, so that you can keep your interior up to date.

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home. We do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses. It's how you can make every moment a special one. For yourself and for everyone around you.
description: Product Description The Bolsius smooth pillar candle in the colour Delicate Red is 6 cm tall, with a burn time of 7 hours. Crafted with passion for people and the planet, using natural vegan wax and palm oil free. The collection includes 4 elegant candles, which can be effortlessly combined with each other. Perfect for the Advent weeks. Safety Warning Place the product in a safe place, away from combustible materials and out of direct sunlight. Use a sturdy candlestick or candleholder, and make sure that the candle can't fall over. If you place several candles together, place them 10cm apart so that they don't get warped from the heat. Straighten the wick before lighting it and use a candle snuffer to avoid splashing.
